title: Get Activity Type
description: Retrieves the details for a single activity from the Fitbit activities database in the format requested. If available, activity level details will display.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

response_fields.name: activity : activityLevels : id
response_fields.description: Numerical value representing the corresponding activity level.

response_fields.name: activity : activityLevels : maxSpeedMPH
response_fields.description: Maximum speed in MPH. Value: -1 means not applicable.

response_fields.name: activity : activityLevels : mets
response_fields.description: METs score for the activity id.

response_fields.name: activity : activityLevels : minSpeedMPH
response_fields.description: Minimum speed in MPH. Value: -1 means not applicable.

response_fields.name: activity : id
response_fields.description: Numerical value representing the corresponding activity.

response_fields.name: activity : name
response_fields.description: The name of the activity or exercise.
